retry_reason: The refcount decrement is unconditional and always succeeds. Retrying would be a double-put (use-after-free).
contract_summary: Put wrapper that releases the cryptographic hash reference (via crypto_free_ahash), frees the algorithm name string, and zeroes the entire sigpool_entry structure. After this call, the entry must not be accessed or freed again. The caller must ensure that __cpool_free_entry is called exactly once per allocated entry, typically paired with a prior get or initialization that established the reference.
